item.title: Case Study #4: Cold Outbound Automation (Clay → Smartlead via n8n)
item.description: Building a hands-off cold outbound engine: Clay enrichment piped into Smartlead, orchestrated end-to-end with n8n.

item.title: Case Study #3: Email Triage, Drafting & Follow-Ups with n8n + Outlook
item.description: An AI-assisted Outlook workflow that classifies mail, drafts replies, and keeps lead and invoice follow-ups on schedule.

item.title: Case Study #2: ElevenLabs Voice Agent + n8n Orchestration
item.description: A voice agent that answers the front desk, powered by ElevenLabs and orchestrated through n8n.

item.title: Case Study #1: Custom n8n Data Enrichment & Automation
item.description: Growth starts with the right signals: a custom n8n pipeline for B2B data enrichment and automation.

item.title: My New Favorite Architecture: Using n8n as a Mid Server
item.description: Moving past an initial skepticism towards visual builders.

item.title: Great Software Engineers Build for a Lifetime
item.description: Building software with longevity — reusable systems and solid foundations — is how engineers truly grow.

item.title: Blazing Fast & Dirt Cheap: Nginx, Cloudflare, and a VPS
item.description: Get fast, cheap global hosting for your React or Vue app with a basic VPS, Nginx, and Cloudflare's free tier.
